title: carex fructus
intro: Carex fructus, also known as the nut grass or nut sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Carex fructus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. Carex fructus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for consumption, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
